entry.title: New: Bill 22 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, ESTIMATED REVENUES AND OFFICE OF THE MAYOR, ADMINISTRATION PROGRAM, GRANT TO AKAKŪ" The purpose of this bill is to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget, by: 1) amending Section 2, Estimated Revenues, by increasing Carryover/Savings from the General Fund by $40,000; 2) amending Section 3.B.12.a.(4), Office of the Mayor, Administration Program, by increasing the appropriation for Grant to Akakū: Maui Community Television by $40,000; and 3) adjusting the totals accordingly.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
